{{Quote|My master has sent me on a mission to find an item of great importance to him. But where are my manners? I am Q4P3.|Q4P3|<ref name="SWG:ToOW">''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Trials of Obi-Wan]]''</ref>}}
'''Q4P3''' was a [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]] who was once sent to [[Mustafar/Legends|Mustafar]] to retrieve the "[[Codex]]" for his master, [[Pann]]. While there, he spoke with several of the [[Droid/Legends|droids]] hoping to discern the location of the "Codex". One of the droids he spoke to led him to believe that he had found the "Codex", but he was not able to get to it due to the fierce animals on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. Instead, he waited inside the [[Mensix Mining Facility/Legends|Mensix Mining Facility]] for someone he could hire to retrieve it.

Soon somebody came along, and Q4P3 gave them a scanner to read the droids who he thought had found the "Codex"'s memory, as it had broken down outside of the facility. The individual soon came back with the item, which turned out to in fact be a [[Sith holocron/Legends|Sith holocron]]. This was not what Q4P3 was looking for, but he paid the individual for performing his job anyway, and let him keep [[Mustafar Sith holocron|the holocron]].

==Behind the scenes==
Q4P3 appeared as a non-player character in the video game Star Wars Galaxies, a massively multiplayer online role-playing game developed by [[Sony]] and published by LucasArts, prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Trials of Obi-Wan]]'' {{1st}}
